name: RGWF96 (lon-lat)

datum.name: Reseau Geodesique de Wallis et Futuna 1996

area: Wallis and Futuna - onshore and offshore - Uvea, Futuna, and Alofi.
remarks: See CRS code 8900 for system with axes in sequence lat-lon to be used for air, land and sea navigation and safety of life purposes. On Wallis island, replaces MOP78 (CRS code 4639) for GIS purposes.
